MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is off calendar at the request of the moving party. Case settled. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Disclosure Of Insureds With Similar Claims Against Defendant State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Hal Chase, Esq. (415-45309555) of Vasquez estrada & Conway LLLP for Plaintiff/Moving party JOHN CHARNON.
Stephen Hayes, Esq. (650-637-9100) of Hayes Scott Bonino Ellingson McLay LLP for Defendant/opposing party.
Court reporter: Barrie Hart, CSR #6954, 415-328-6644, Reported.

Reporter Fee not paid.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces 2 issues - Judgments and documents relating to accusations of bad faith. Plaintiff argues and cites Colonial Case. The Court makes a proposal re: identifying 35 files. Parties meet and confer in the hallway.

10:02
The matter is recalled. Parties read their stipulation on the record. (as fully reported in the Reporter's notes.) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOHN MARK CHARNON'S Motion To Compel Disclosure Of Insureds With Similar Claims Against Defendant State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company is Granted in small part. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcripts) Moving party to submit a proposed order n compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Barrie Hart, CSR #6954, 415-328-6644, Reported. =(302/HK)
